content.json:
# SpyCloud Breach Watchlist Dashboard
**Credential Exposure Monitoring** - Track credential exposures, severity trends, and affected users from SpyCloud Breach Watchlist data.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL data for monitoring darknet credential exposures across your organization.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Total Exposures", 0, 1, "Unique Users", 0, 2, "Plaintext Passwords", 0, 3, "Critical (Sev 25)", 0, 4, "High (Sev 20)", 0, 5]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Total Exposures", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Unique Users", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(password_plaintext) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Plaintext Passwords", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Critical (Sev 25)", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity == 20 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="High (Sev 20)", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Breach Watchlist Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), SeverityLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Exposure Severity Trend Over Time

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend PasswordCategory = case(
    isnotempty(password_plaintext), "Plaintext",
    isnotempty(password) and password_type has "cracked", "Cracked",
    isnotempty(password) and password_type has "hash", "Hashed",
    isnotempty(password_type), tostring(password_type),
    "Unknown")
| summarize Count=count() by PasswordCategory)
content.title: Password Type Distribution

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), PlaintextPasswords=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), DistinctBreaches=dcount(source_id), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| top 25 by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| project User=email, RiskLevel, Exposures, PlaintextPasswords, DistinctBreaches, LatestExposure)
content.title: Top 25 Most Exposed Users

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize ExposedCredentials=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email), CriticalCount=countif(severity == 25) by tostring(email_domain)
| order by ExposedCredentials desc
| take 20)
content.title: Exposures by Email Domain
